description: Summary figure showing serpin architecture, why HSP47 cannot inhibit proteases, and GO curation recommendation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a schematic showing the serpin inhibitory mechanism and why HSP47 can't do it
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 7))

# === Panel A: Serpin domain architecture ===
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.set_aspect('equal')
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title("A. Serpin Fold Architecture", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Draw simplified serpin body
from matplotlib.patches import Ellipse, FancyArrowPatch
body = Ellipse((5, 4), 6, 5, facecolor='#E3F2FD', edgecolor='#1565C0', linewidth=2)
ax1.add_patch(body)
ax1.text(5, 4.5, 'β-Sheet A\n(insertion target)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, 
         color='#1565C0', fontstyle='italic')

# Draw RCL as a loop on top
rcl_x = np.array([2.5, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 7.5])
rcl_y = np.array([6.3, 7.5, 8.5, 9, 8.5, 7.5, 6.3])
ax1.plot(rcl_x, rcl_y, 'r-', linewidth=3, label='Reactive Center Loop (RCL)')
ax1.plot(5, 9, 'r*', markersize=20)
ax1.text(5, 9.4, 'P1 (reactive bond)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Hinge region
ax1.plot([2.5, 3.5], [6.3, 7.8], color='orange', linewidth=4, alpha=0.7)
ax1.text(2.2, 7.2, 'Hinge\nregion', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='orange', fontweight='bold')

# RDEL label
ax1.text(5, 1.5, 'RDEL (ER retention)', ha='center', fontsize=10, color='purple', 
         fontweight='bold', style='italic')

# === Panel B: Why HSP47 can't inhibit ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title("B. Why HSP47 Cannot Inhibit\nSerine Proteases", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

evidence_text = """
❌ HINGE REGION (P14-P9):
   0/6 small residues
   (need ≥4/6 for RCL insertion)
   Pro at P13 → rigid backbone
   Phe at P12 → steric clash

❌ ER-RESIDENT PROTEIN:
   RDEL retention signal
   Not secreted to encounter
   extracellular proteases

❌ NO INHIBITORY ACTIVITY:
   Multiple studies confirm
   no serine protease inhibition
   (Nagata lab, 2011, 2017)

✅ ACTUAL FUNCTION:
   Collagen-specific chaperone
   Binds triple-helical procollagen
   Essential for collagen maturation
   Knockout = embryonic lethal
"""

ax2.text(0.05, 0.95, evidence_text, transform=ax2.transAxes, fontsize=11,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFF3E0', alpha=0.8))

# === Panel C: GO Curation Recommendation ===
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title("C. GO Curation Recommendation", fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

curation_text = """
CURRENT ANNOTATION:
  GO:0004867
  serine-type endopeptidase
  inhibitor activity
  Evidence: IBA (phylogenetic)

VERDICT: OVER-ANNOTATED ⚠️

IBA transferred from serpin
superfamily, but HSP47 is a
non-inhibitory serpin member.

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✗ REMOVE GO:0004867
  (no supporting evidence)

✓ RETAIN GO:0005518
  (collagen binding - IEA)

✓ RETAIN GO:0051082
  (unfolded protein binding
   - IDA from MGI)

? CONSIDER adding
  GO:0030544
  (Hsp70 protein binding)
  or a chaperone activity term
"""

ax3.text(0.05, 0.95, curation_text, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=10.5,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#E8F5E9', alpha=0.8))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("hsp47_go_curation_summary.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: hsp47_go_curation_summary.png")
